Bus Timings

Bus 43 Timings Corniche Hospital to Al Mushrif Coop

February 5, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 43 offers a reliable and extensive public transportation service in Abu Dhabi, linking key locations between Corniche Hospital and Al Mushrif Coop. This bus route is essential for residents and visitors traveling across the city, providing easy access to major landmarks, shopping areas, and residential neighborhoods. The service is well-regulated, with frequent buses throughout the day, making it a dependable choice for various travel needs.

Route Name 43
Route Description Corniche Hospital - Al Mushrif Coop
Total Distance Approximately 15 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 11 minutes
Operational Hours 05:25 to 23:24 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website AD Mobility

Download PDF Bus 43

Bus 43 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

Bus 43 operates with a consistent schedule, ensuring regular service throughout the day. The timings are as follows:

From Corniche Hospital From Al Mushrif Coop
05:27 05:25
05:56 05:55
06:26 06:20
06:56 06:50

07:55 07:51

19:23 18:51
19:53 19:21
20:24 19:51
21:25 20:57
22:24 21:57
23:24 22:57

Bus 43 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or you may check this link for 43 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 43 is reasonably priced, adhering to the standard public transportation rates in Abu Dhabi. Passengers can expect to pay approximately AED 3 per trip using a Hafilat card, which is accepted across the city’s bus network. This affordability makes Bus 43 an attractive option for both daily commutes and occasional travel. It’s a cost-effective choice that offers great value for your money.

Bus Booking

Bus 43 can be accessed directly at the designated stops along its route, and there is no requirement for advance booking. The app provides real-time tracking and schedule updates, enhancing the travel experience by ensuring you are always informed about the bus’s arrival times.

Bus Route

Bus 43 follows a comprehensive route that connects significant points of interest and important locations in Abu Dhabi. Here’s a detailed look at the stops along the route:

  1. Corniche Hospital

  2. Corniche Hospital

  3. Al Mina Street

  4. Hamdan Street

  5. Zayed The First Street

  6. Electra Park

  7. Al Khabiyah Street

  8. Fatima Bint Mubarak Street

  9. Al Thughour Street

  10. Sultan Bin Zayed The First Street

  11. Sheikh Rashid Bin Saeed Street

  12. Sheikh Zayed 1st Mosque

  13. Etisalat

  14. Al Falah Street

  15. Al Manhal Palace

  16. Al Falah Street

  17. SKMC

  18. Fatima Bint Abd Al Rahman Mosque

  19. Delma Street

  20. Delma Street

  21. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  22. Al Mushrif Palace

  23. Al Mushrif Garden

  24. Abu Dhabi Golf and Equestrian Club

  10. Al Nashrah Street

  12. Al Nahda National School

  13. Salama Bint Butti Street

  14. Al Ghaf Park

  15. Mishrif Mall

  16. Al Dhafra Street

  17. Al Tarfeeh Street

  18. Al Gurm

  19. Al Mushrif Coop

Bus 43 Station Overview

Corniche Hospital

The Corniche Hospital bus station is strategically located near one of Abu Dhabi’s prominent healthcare facilities. This station caters to patients, medical staff, and visitors traveling to and from the hospital. With its proximity to the hospital, the station provides convenient access to healthcare services, ensuring that visitors can easily reach the medical center. It is well-equipped with essential amenities, making it a practical stop for those involved in healthcare-related activities.

Al Mushrif Coop

The Al Mushrif Coop bus station serves as a key transit point near the Al Mushrif Cooperative Society, a popular shopping destination for residents in the area. Its location near the cooperative society makes it a convenient stop for those looking to do their shopping or run errands. The station is well-maintained, providing a comfortable and efficient experience for passengers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 43 in Abu Dhabi passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations. Here are a few highlights along its route:

  1. Corniche Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, it is located near the Corniche, a popular waterfront area with parks and recreational spaces.

2.

  1. Al Manhal Palace: A historic palace that provides insight into Abu Dhabi’s heritage and architectural style.

  2. Abu Dhabi Golf and Equestrian Club: A premier destination for golf enthusiasts and those interested in equestrian sports, offering world-class facilities.

  3. Mishrif Mall: A major shopping destination featuring a range of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  4. Al Ghaf Park: A popular park providing scenic spots and leisure areas for families and visitors.

  5. Sheikh Zayed 1st Mosque: An important religious site, offering a glimpse into Islamic architecture and culture.

Journey Experience

A bus trip on route 43 from Corniche Hospital to Al Mushrif Coop offers a long yet scenic journey through the heart of Abu Dhabi. Starting at Corniche Hospital, passengers can enjoy views of the stunning Abu Dhabi Corniche, a popular waterfront destination with parks, beaches, and cycling paths.

Approaching Al Mushrif Coop, passengers experience the transition from the city’s bustling commercial areas to the quieter, more residential side of Al Mushrif.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily reach Al Mushrif Coop, the final destination on the Bus 43 route starting from Corniche Hospital. The ride offers a convenient and comfortable option to travel across the city, with prices ranging from AED 38 to 45. This makes it a practical choice for those looking to explore the city or complete their errands at one of Abu Dhabi’s key locations.

With its comprehensive route, frequent service, and affordable pricing, Bus 43 offers a convenient and efficient way to navigate Abu Dhabi. Whether you’re traveling for work, shopping, or leisure, this bus route ensures easy access to many of the city’s key locations.
